name: elyra-code-viewer-extension

metadata.name: elyra-code-viewer-extension
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: Elyra provides AI Centric extensions to JupyterLab

documentation: 'The Code Viewer extension adds the ability to display a given chunk of code (string) in a transient read-only 'editor' without needing to create a file.This extension will be available in JupyterLab core in a near future release and removed from Elyra as a standalone extension.'
